data.title: Brazilian equities are surging in 2026, with iShares MSCI Brazil ETF (EWZ) up 20% month-to-date, outperforming SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) by 17 percentage points. EWZ ranks as the third best U.S.-listed country ETF, signaling a potential technical breakout. During the last commodity supercycle, Brazilian equities outpaced S&P 500 by over 1,000%, highlighting their leverage to resource-driven markets.
data.description: Brazilian equities are experiencing a strong resurgence in early 2026 due to surging commodity prices, a weakening U.S. dollar, and a shift towards emerging markets. The iShares MSCI Brazil ETF (NYSE: EWZ) has risen by approximately 20% month-to-date, significantly outperforming the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY) which has only gained around 3% in the same period. This 17-percentage-point difference represents the strongest one-month outperformance by EWZ against U.S. equities in over four years. The EWZ is currently the third best-performing U.S.-listed country ETF in the past month, following only the iShares MSCI Peru and Global Exposure ETF (NYSE: EPU) up by 26%, and the iShares MSCI South Korea ETF (NYSE: EWY). The EWZ/SPY spread has broken above its long-term downtrend, indicating a potential technical breakout that could attract more investment into Brazilian equities, historically known for their leverage in resource-driven bull markets. In the last major commodity supercycle from October 2002 to May 2008, Brazilian equities outpaced the S&P 500 by over 1,000%. This growth trend is expected to continue, as experts predict further gains for Brazilian equities. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: UTF shares dividend sources on Jan 30, 2026, for shareholders, under Section 19(a) - key disclosure for fiscal distribution.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, it was announced that shareholders of Cohen & Steers Infrastructure Fund, Inc. will receive a distribution on January 30, 2026. The distribution sources and cumulative distributions for the fiscal year will be disclosed. This information is important for investors of the Fund listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol UTF.

data.title: Cohen & Steers REIT and Preferred and Income Fund (RNP) shares sources of distribution for Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, a press release was issued to inform shareholders of Cohen & Steers REIT and Preferred and Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: RNP) about the upcoming distribution payment on January 30, 2026. The release outlined details about the sources of the distribution and cumulative distributions paid so far. Shareholders were advised to review the information provided in the release to stay informed about their investments in the Fund.

data.title: International Tower Hill Mines closes US$115M equity financing, issuing 33,672,000 common shares.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC, on January 27, 2026, International Tower Hill Mines Ltd. disclosed the completion of an increased public offering. The offering involved 33,672,000 common shares, with no par value, of the Company. The shares were traded on both TSX under the ticker symbol ITH and on NYSE American as THM.

data.title: Trident secures $15M in bought-deal financing.
data.description: The latest data reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month’s rate of 5.2%. The economy added 250,000 jobs in July, surpassing expectations and demonstrating positive growth. These numbers indicate a promising trend towards recovery following the economic downturn caused by the pandemic. Additionally, the stock market also saw a notable increase, with the Dow Jones surging by 2.5% to reach a record high of 35,000 points. These developments have fostered optimism among analysts and investors regarding the nation’s economic outlook.

data.title: FHLB Dallas and Community Bank of Mississippi to award $150,000 grant for legal services to aid housing stability in Southern Mississippi.
data.description: In Hattiesburg, Mississippi, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and Community Bank of Mississippi are set to present a $150,000 Pathway Fund grant to the Mississippi Center for Legal Services Corp. (MCLS). This grant aims to bolster legal aid services that assist families in clearing property titles and safeguarding generational homes. The effort is focused on enhancing housing stability in the southern region of Mississippi. The ceremonial check presentation is scheduled for Tuesday and represents a significant step in supporting these vital services for the community. The collaboration between these institutions underscores their commitment to addressing housing challenges and providing essential aid to residents.

data.title: BXP reports Q4 2025 revenue of $877.1 million, up 2.2% from Q4 2024, with net income of $248.5 million.
data.description: In Boston, BXP, Inc., the leading developer, owner, and manager of top workplaces in the U.S., released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. During the fourth quarter of 2025, revenue rose by 2.2% to $877.1 million, compared to $858.6 million in the same period of 2024. Net income attributable to BXP, Inc. was $248.5 million, equivalent to $1.56 per share.

data.title: Prologis announces tax treatment of 2025 dividends for PLD stock. Details in Exhibits A and B.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Prologis, Inc., a logistics real estate company and NYSE-listed (PLD) global leader, disclosed the tax treatment of its 2025 distributions. The tax treatment details for distributions per share of common and preferred stock of Prologis, Inc. can be found in Exhibits A and B.

data.title: Notification of upcoming distribution for Cohen & Steers Quality Income Realty Fund (RQI) on Jan 30, 2026. Source breakdown provided.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, a recent press release disclosed vital details to shareholders of Cohen & Steers Quality Income Realty Fund, Inc. (NYSE: RQI) about the upcoming distribution payment scheduled for January 30, 2026. The release also included information about the sources of the distribution and cumulative distributions paid throughout the fiscal period.

data.title: Dialed Moods signs deals with MMA fighter Paulo Costa, WBC-NABF champion Blair Cobbs, and BJJ competitor Nicky Ryan as brand ambassadors for natural supplements.
data.description: A wellness company based in Costa Mesa, California called Dialed Moods has recently announced the signing of three professional athletes as brand ambassadors. Among them are MMA-UFC fighter Paulo Costa, WBC-NABF champion Blair Cobbs, and Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu competitor Nicky Ryan. These athletes will endorse the company's range of natural supplements. Dialed Moods co-founder and CEO, Ali Garawi, stated that the selection of these athletes was based on their alignment with the company's mission and energy. The partnership aims to leverage the athletes' dedication and achievements to promote Dialed Moods products.

data.title: Cohen & Steers Total Return Realty Fund (RFI) informs shareholders of distribution sources on Jan 30, 2026.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, a press release was issued regarding the distribution for shareholders of Cohen & Steers Total Return Realty Fund, Inc. (NYSE: RFI). The distribution is scheduled to be paid on January 30, 2026. This release provides details on the sources of the distribution and cumulative distributions paid so far in the fiscal year. Shareholders are advised to take note of this important information.

data.title: Gilbane appoints Brett Mitchell as Senior Director, Business Development for West Division. Jan 27, 2026. #PRNewswire
data.description: A highly experienced individual has been chosen to oversee strategic growth and client relationships in important markets. Dr. Brett Mitchell, Ed.D, M.Ed, CBO, DBIA, has been appointed as Senior Director of Gilbane Building, a prominent global construction company headquartered in Sacramento, California. This announcement was made on January 27, 2026. Dr. Mitchell will be responsible for driving growth and fostering partnerships in key markets for the company.

data.title: Transit Technologies acquires Vehicle Installs for improved deployment capabilities, catering to various client bases.
data.description: Transit Technologies, based in Knoxville, Tennessee, has recently acquired Vehicle Installs to enhance its end-to-end solutions for various client sectors such as Public Sector, Fleet, Campus, and K-12/Motorcoach. This strategic acquisition aims to support scaling and ensure consistency across the company's operations. The acquisition was made public on Jan. 27, 2026. This move is expected to significantly impact Transit Technologies' client base, consisting of a substantial number of organizations in the mentioned sectors.

data.title: DelveInsight offers real-time pharma conference coverage services, aiding strategic decision-making. LAS VEGAS, Jan. 27, 2026 /PRNewswire.
data.description: DelveInsight offers comprehensive pharma conference coverage services to assist industry leaders in monitoring and analyzing important developments from key healthcare conferences. On Jan. 27, 2026, in LAS VEGAS, DelveInsight announced their commitment to supporting the pharmaceutical sector's ongoing evolution.

data.title: Arlo Solutions appoints ex-U.S. Air Force CIO Venice Goodwine as CIO on 27-Jan-2026, per PR Newswire correction.
data.description: Arlo Solutions has announced the appointment of Venice Goodwine as their new Chief Information Officer. Goodwine, a former U.S. Air Force CIO, brings a wealth of experience to the role. The news was released on January 27, 2026, via PR Newswire. This change marks a significant move for the company, showcasing their commitment to enhancing their leadership team.

data.title: Braemar Hotels & Resorts reports tax info for 2025 distributions on common and preferred shares, including Federal Form 1099-DIV.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: BHR) disclosed the tax reporting details for the 2025 distributions on its common shares and various preferred shares. The company shared the information required for Federal Form 1099-DIV related to its Series B, D, E, and M preferred shares, outlining the specific amounts distributed.

data.title: Ashford Hospitality Trust discloses tax info for 2025 preferred share distributions (Series D-M); Forms 1099-DIV were issued.
data.description: In Dallas today, the company Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AHT) shared details regarding the tax reporting (Federal Form 1099-DIV) for the distributions made in 2025 on its preferred shares Series D, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, and M. The provided data includes important information on the amounts distributed during the year, offering clarity to shareholders for tax purposes.

data.title: Ponce Financial Group, Inc. announces Q4 2025 results. Company is the holding company for Ponce Bank, N.A.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Ponce Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PDLB), the parent company of Ponce Bank, N.A., disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025.
